description: Comprehensive evaluation test cases for /pace-init skill (12 scenarios, 82 assertions)

evals.name: stage-a-new-project-minimal
evals.prompt: I just created an empty git repo for a new side project called 'taskflow'. Run /pace-init taskflow to set it up.
evals.expected_output: Detects Stage A, generates minimal .devpace/ with state.md (~6 lines), project.md, backlog/, workflow.md, checks.md. CLAUDE.md injected. Next-step guidance.

assertions.text: .devpace/state.md exists and contains devpace-version marker
.devpace/project.md exists and contains 'taskflow'
.devpace/backlog/ directory exists
.devpace/rules/workflow.md exists with CR state machine
.devpace/rules/checks.md exists with at least 2 check items
CLAUDE.md contains devpace-start and devpace-end markers
No {{PLACEHOLDER}} remains in generated files
state.md content lines ~6 (±2, excluding HTML comments and blanks)
Output mentions '新项目' or similar Stage A description
Next-step guidance includes '帮我实现' type prompt

evals.name: stage-b-nodejs-auto-detect
evals.prompt: This is an existing Node.js project with 15+ source files and multiple feature branches. Run /pace-init to start tracking development.
evals.expected_output: Detects Stage B, auto-detects project name, identifies PF candidates, lists branches, detects Git strategy, generates context.md, checks.md with eslint/jest.

assertions.text: Detects Stage B based on commit count and unmerged branches
Project name auto-detected from package.json
project.md value tree pre-populated with PF candidates from src/ subdirs
In-progress work candidates listed from unmerged branches
context.md exists and contains Git strategy detection result
checks.md contains eslint-related check command
state.md content lines ~10 (±2)
Zero or minimal user questions (auto-detection preferred)

evals.name: stage-c-released-project
evals.prompt: Initialize devpace for our production app. It has 100+ commits, version tags (v2.1.0, v2.2.0, v2.3.1), a CHANGELOG.md, and fly.toml deployment config.
evals.expected_output: Detects Stage C, auto-configures version management, creates integrations/config.md, generates DORA baseline, parses CHANGELOG for BR/PF seed data.

assertions.text: Detects Stage C with mention of version tags
integrations/config.md exists with version management section
metrics/dashboard.md exists with DORA baseline data
Version tag format (vX.Y.Z) detected and configured
pace-sync recommendation uses 'recommend' wording (not 'optional')
CHANGELOG entries presented as BR/PF seed candidates
state.md content lines ~13 (±2)
fly.toml recognized as deployment config

evals.name: monorepo-detection
evals.prompt: This is a pnpm monorepo with 3 packages (web, api, shared). Initialize devpace for it.
evals.expected_output: Detects pnpm-workspace.yaml, selects single root .devpace/, records monorepo structure in context.md.

assertions.text: Detects pnpm-workspace.yaml as monorepo signal
context.md records monorepo structure with 3 sub-packages
Chooses option A: single root .devpace/
state.md exists with version marker
Lifecycle stage detected as B (8+ commits)
checks.md exists
workflow.md exists with state machine

evals.name: from-prd-document
evals.prompt: Initialize devpace for py-api-service using --from docs/prd.md to extract features from PRD.
evals.expected_output: Extracts 3 BRs from user stories, maps P0/P1/P2 priorities, extracts NFRs to project principles.

assertions.text: Extracts 3 BR candidates from user stories (auth, profile, search)
Priority markers P0/P1/P2 identified and mapped
Non-functional requirements extracted to project principles
project.md value tree has PF structure from --from
Standard init also completed (state.md, checks.md exist)
Python toolchain detected (pytest, ruff)
Source annotations present with file origin

evals.name: reset-keep-insights
evals.prompt: Reset devpace while keeping insights with --reset --keep-insights.
evals.expected_output: Cleans .devpace/ except insights.md, removes CLAUDE.md devpace section, preserves non-devpace content.

assertions.text: .devpace/ cleaned except insights
insights.md preserved with full content (2 patterns)
CLAUDE.md devpace section removed
CLAUDE.md non-devpace content preserved
insights.md confidence NOT degraded (reset, not import)
backlog CRs deleted (CR-001, CR-002)

evals.name: dryrun-zero-side-effects
evals.prompt: Preview what pace-init would generate without writing any files. Run /pace-init taskflow --dry-run in an empty git repo.
evals.expected_output: Outputs preview of files, detects lifecycle stage, writes NOTHING to disk.

assertions.text: Output shows preview of files that would be created
Output includes lifecycle stage detection result
.devpace/ directory does NOT exist after execution
CLAUDE.md is NOT created or modified
No files are written anywhere in the project
Preview mentions state.md, project.md, workflow.md, checks.md
Output ends with prompt to run actual init

evals.name: verify-health-check
evals.prompt: Run /pace-init --verify on an existing devpace project to check its health status.
evals.expected_output: Health check report with PASS/WARN/FAIL per file, zero file modifications.

assertions.text: Output is a health check report, not re-initialization
Checks state.md version marker presence
Checks project.md structure completeness
Checks CLAUDE.md devpace markers presence
Reports overall health status (healthy or lists issues)
Does NOT modify any existing files

evals.name: claude-md-merge
evals.prompt: Initialize devpace on a project that already has a CLAUDE.md with custom Build Commands, Architecture, and Custom Rules sections.
evals.expected_output: Original CLAUDE.md content preserved, devpace section appended with markers, Edit tool used.

assertions.text: Original CLAUDE.md content fully preserved (Build Commands, Architecture, Custom Rules)
devpace section appended with devpace-start/devpace-end markers
Uses Edit tool (not Write) to modify existing CLAUDE.md
No content duplication or format corruption
devpace-start appears before devpace-end in file
.devpace/ directory created normally alongside CLAUDE.md merge

evals.name: idempotency-safety
evals.prompt: Run /pace-init on a project that already has .devpace/ with state.md (v1.6.0), project.md, and CLAUDE.md with devpace markers.
evals.expected_output: Detects existing .devpace/, preserves all content, MD5 checksums identical pre/post.

assertions.text: Detects existing .devpace/ and does not re-create from scratch
state.md content preserved (existing work items not lost)
project.md existing content preserved
CLAUDE.md content outside devpace markers unchanged ('My Custom Section' preserved)
No duplicate files created
Version marker in state.md not downgraded

evals.name: version-migration
evals.prompt: Run /pace-init on a project with .devpace/state.md marked as v1.5.0. It should detect the old version and migrate.
evals.expected_output: Detects v1.5.0, migrates to v1.6.0 with additive-only changes, preserves existing data.

assertions.text: Detects v1.5.0 version marker and triggers migration
state.md version marker updated to current version (1.6.0)
Existing data preserved (CR-001 work item not lost)
Migration process produces visible output (not silent)
Migration follows additive-only safety rule (no field deletion)

evals.name: go-toolchain-detection
evals.prompt: Initialize devpace for a Go project with go.mod and .golangci.yml.
evals.expected_output: Detects Go from go.mod, generates checks with go test + golangci-lint, Stage B classification.

assertions.text: Detects Go language from go.mod
checks.md contains 'go test ./...' command
checks.md contains 'golangci-lint run' command (detected .golangci.yml)
context.md records Go tech stack information
Project name extracted from go.mod module path
Lifecycle stage detected as B (8+ commits)
